seoTitle: Burran Rock vs Burrup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Burran Rock and Burrup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Burran Rock vs Burrup: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Burran Rock and Burrup.
heading: Burran Rock vs Burrup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burran Rock, Western Australia and Burrup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burran Rock has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Burrup (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burran Rock or Burrup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burran Rock has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Burrup scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burran Rock scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Burrup scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burran Rock or Burrup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burran Rock has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
